{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Belcor
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Belcor]] is a village located between the current location and [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
